products.name: Product Development & Consulting
products.descriptor: Composite product development, prototyping, 3D printing, and technical consulting service

evidence.snippet:
Product Development & Consulting
================================
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20716%201200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
Prototype Manufacturing and 3D Printing Services
------------------------------------------------
At Iberia Compositech, we transform ideas into **high-performance solutions** through expert product development, consulting, prototype manufacturing, and 3D printing.
From concept to validation, we help **reduce** **development time** and **cost** without compromising technical quality.

Whether starting with a sketch, CAD file or idea, our multidisciplinary team guides every step:
*   **3D modelling and CAD refinement**
*   **Material selection and performance analysis**
*   **Functional and visual prototyping**
*   **Technical consulting and feasibility studies**
*   **Pre-series production prep**
We ensure your product is manufacturable and optimised for real-world use

unresolved_questions: Eight of nine products were classified from the homepage navigation and one fetched product page (resource-0002). The sector pages (Defence, Aeronautics/Aerospace, Naval) and technology pages (Prepreg Composites, Infusion, RTM) and service pages (Engineering, Manufacturing) were all skipped_class_budget with page_class=other, so sub-service details, readiness language, and any compliance claims for those offerings are unknown.
NDAA and Blue UAS status are unknown for all products — no compliance claims found in the fetched corpus.
The vendor holds EN9100 certification (aeronautical quality standard) per resource-0010, but this does not map to NDAA compliance for individual products.

fetch_requests.reason: Detail page for Defence Composite Manufacturing sector offering; would clarify sub-services, readiness language, and any NDAA/compliance claims for defence work.
Detail page for Aeronautics/Aerospace Composite Manufacturing; most UXV-relevant sector offering — would confirm sub-services and readiness.
Detail page for Engineering Services offering; would clarify scope of design/simulation capabilities.
Detail page for Manufacturing Services offering; would clarify production capabilities and readiness.
Detail page for Prepreg Composites technology; would clarify materials and process capabilities.
Detail page for RTM technology offering; would clarify process scope and readiness.
Detail page for Infusion technology offering; would clarify process scope and readiness.
Detail page for Naval Composite Manufacturing sector; would clarify sub-services.
